nativeProps: none; attributes merge into one concrete child

compositionPolicy.initialVisibility: Present server content starts entered and visible unless initialEnter is explicitly requested.
compositionPolicy.exit: The declared deadline is authoritative; earlier transition or animation events are ignored and the timeout guarantees completion.
compositionPolicy.interruption: Returning present to true while exiting cancels unmount and re-enters.
compositionPolicy.advantage: Root end events cannot remove content before the declared longest-property deadline, and interrupted exits recover safely.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: initialEnter=false removes initial motion state; omitting onExitComplete emits no callback; omitting reducedMotion follows the provider policy.
